import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line1 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let line2 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let a = string.split_whitespace(line1)
  let b = string.split_whitespace(line2)
  let n = a.len()
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let sa = match a.get(i)
    when Some(s)
      s
    when None
      ""
    end
    let sb = match b.get(i)
    when Some(s)
      s
    when None
      ""
    end
    let xa = match string.parse_int(sa)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    let xb = match string.parse_int(sb)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    let s = xa + xb
    println("#{xa}+#{xb}=#{s}")
    i = i + 1
  end
  Ok(())
end
